heading: Safety and Precautions
dos: Regularly inspect any signs of wear, damage, or loose components
Adhere strictly to the manufacturer’s instructions and guidelines
Park the machine on stable ground
Travel with the load low to the ground. Travel slowly with caution over rough, slippery and loose surfaces
donts: Avoid operating on unstable or uneven ground whenever possible
Do not weld or cut wheel rims
Do not change any tyre sizes
Do not inflate the tyre beyond the recommended value
